obligation_a: Passwords must contain at least 12 characters and undergo reset every 90 days.
obligation_b: Password rotation is not required under any circumstances.
label: CONFLICT

obligation_a: Passwords must contain at least 12 characters and undergo reset every 90 days.
obligation_b: All credentials must have at least 12 symbols and change quarterly.
label: REDUNDANT

obligation_a: Corporate accounts shall enforce a minimum 14-character password length.
obligation_b: It is mandatory to use passwords with a minimum length of 14 characters.
label: REDUNDANT

obligation_a: Passwords must contain at least 12 characters and undergo reset every 90 days.
obligation_b: Corporate accounts shall enforce a minimum 14-character password length.
label: COMPLEMENTARY

obligation_a: Passwords must contain at least 12 characters and undergo reset every 90 days.
obligation_b: User passwords must combine uppercase, lowercase, and numeric digits.
label: COMPLEMENTARY
